title: deyeuxia jamesonii
intro: Deyeuxia jamesonii, also known as Jameson's grass or mountain grass, is a type of perennial grass native to New Zealand. The plant is said to have medicinal properties, with a history of being used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Deyeuxia jamesonii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making an infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
